debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
m : MeasurableSpace Ω
X : Ω → Set ι
u : Set ι
p : ↑unitInterval
P : Measure Ω
hX : @ProbabilityTheory.IsBernoulliOn ι Ω m X u p P
⊢ iIndepFun (fun i ω => i ∈ X ω) P

failed_attempts:
by
  rw [iIndepFun_iff_measure_infinitePi_map]
  have h := hX.map MeasurableEquiv.setOf.symm.measurable
  rw [bernoulliOn_eq_map, Measure.map_map MeasurableEquiv.setOf.symm.measurable
    MeasurableEquiv.setOf.measurable] at h
  simpa [h.map_eq, ← infinitePi_map_eval]

by
  refine (IdentDistrib.iIndepFun ?_).1 (iIndepFun_pi_eval _)
  refine ⟨by fun_prop, by fun_prop, ?_⟩
  rw [Measure.map_id, ← hX.map_eq, bernoulliOn_eq_map, Measure.map_map]
  · simp
  · exact MeasurableEquiv.setOf.symm.measurable
  · exact MeasurableEquiv.setOf.measurable

by

  have h : map (fun ω i ↦ i ∈ X ω) P = infinitePi μ := by
    rw [← hX.law, bernoulliOn_eq_map, ← Measure.map_map MeasurableEquiv.setOf.measurable
      MeasurableEquiv.setOf.symm.measurable]
    simp
  simp_rw [h, Measure.map_map (measurable_pi_apply _) hX.measurable, ← h, Measure.map_pi_apply μ]
